articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?
articles.description: We have the final 26-player squads that can win the FIFA World Cup, so let's go through all 48 teams and rank where they stand.

season.name: 2026 World Cup Qualifying - Concacaf, Second Round

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Bermuda 1, Cayman Islands 0. Zeiko Lewis (Bermuda) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Cameron Gray (Cayman Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half begins Bermuda 1, Cayman Islands 0.
Goal! Bermuda 2, Cayman Islands 0. Djair Parfitt-Williams (Bermuda) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Zeiko Lewis.
Substitution, Bermuda. J’Nai Butterfield-Steede replaces Deniche Hill because of an injury.
Goal! Bermuda 3, Cayman Islands 0. Kole Hall (Bermuda) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Djair Parfitt-Williams.
Substitution, Bermuda. Rahzir Smith-Jones replaces Zeiko Lewis.
Substitution, Bermuda. Sachiel Ming replaces Djair Parfitt-Williams.
Substitution, Bermuda. Enrique Russell replaces Kole Hall.
Substitution, Bermuda. Reggie Lambe replaces Keziah Martin.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Matthew Suberan replaces Sebastian Martinez.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Joshwa Campbell replaces Elijah Seymour.
Goal! Bermuda 4, Cayman Islands 0. Reggie Lambe (Bermuda) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner following a corner.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Tyler Beckford replaces Mason Duval.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Dimetri Douglas replaces Zachary Scott.
Goal! Bermuda 5, Cayman Islands 0. Julian Carpenter (Bermuda) left footed shot from very close range to the high centre of the goal following a corner.
Matthew Suberan (Cayman Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Jabari Campbell (Cayman Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Bermuda 5, Cayman Islands 0.
